title: tf.math.bincount  |  TensorFlow v2.16.1
description:
Counts the number of occurrences of each value in an integer array.
Ifminlengthandmaxlengthare not given, returns a vector with lengthtf.reduce_max(arr) + 1ifarris non-empty, and length 0 otherwise.
Vector length = Maximum element in vectorvaluesis 5. Adding 1, which is 6
                will be the vector length.
